name: Cheesy Bagel Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bagels with mustard.
2. Mix remaining ingredients; spread evenly to the edges of the bagels.
3. Set oven control to broil and/or 550°F. Place the bagels with the tops about 5 inches from the heat until the topping is bubbly, approximately 1 minute.
4. Cut each bagel into 6 pieces.
36 appetizers; 30 calories per appetizer.
